import FreeCAD as App, Part, os, csv
NONCE="SWEEP45-1"
D=r"C:\Users\Rchie\AppData\Local\Temp\claude\...\scratchpad"
def load(nm,P,Q):
    s=Part.Shape(); s.read(os.path.join(D,nm+".brp")); s.Placement=App.Placement(App.Vector(*P),App.Rotation(*Q)); return s
lever=load("TestLever",[0,2.5,0],[0,0,0,1])
servo=load("MG995_Ref",[0,-16.66,10],[1,0,0,1e-16])
sb=servo.BoundBox
def box(x0,x1,y0,y1,z0,z1): return Part.makeBox(x1-x0,y1-y0,z1-z0,App.Vector(x0,y0,z0))
inXL,inXR=sb.XMin-0.5,sb.XMax+0.5; outXL,outXR=inXL-10,inXR+10
floorTop,floorBot=sb.ZMin-0.5,sb.ZMin-4.5; yBack,tableZ,Wtop=sb.YMin-1,-50,10
walls=[box(outXL,inXL,yBack,0,tableZ,Wtop),box(inXR,outXR,yBack,0,tableZ,Wtop),box(outXL,outXR,yBack,0,floorBot,floorTop)]
base=box(outXL-12,outXR+12,yBack-5,8,tableZ,tableZ+4)
Lx,Rx=(inXL+outXL)/2,(inXR+outXR)/2; Ys,Yr=sb.YMax-6,sb.YMin+6
fast=[box(bx-2.6,bx+2.6,by-2.6,by+2.6,10,14.6) for bx,by in [(Lx,Ys),(Rx,Ys),(Lx,Yr),(Rx,Yr)]]
Yv=App.Vector(0,1,0)
def mind(L,shapes): return min(L.distToShape(s)[0] for s in shapes)
def pen(L,shapes):
    t=0.0
    for s in shapes:
        if L.BoundBox.intersect(s.BoundBox):
            try: t+=L.common(s).Volume
            except Exception: pass
    return t
rows=[]
for th in range(-45,46):
    L=lever.copy(); L.Placement=App.Placement(App.Vector(0,2.5,0),App.Rotation(Yv,th))
    ds=mind(L,walls); db=L.distToShape(base)[0]; dv=L.distToShape(servo)[0]; df=mind(L,fast)
    p=pen(L,walls+[base])
    mn=min(ds,db,dv,df); comp=["stand","base","servo","fasteners"][[ds,db,dv,df].index(mn)]
    rows.append((th,round(ds,3),round(db,3),round(dv,3),round(df,3),round(mn,3),comp,round(p,2)))
mn_all=min(r[5] for r in rows); mn_ang=[r for r in rows if r[5]==mn_all][0]
firstpen=next((r[0] for r in rows if r[7]>0.05),None)
print("min_clearance=%.3f at angle=%d  pair=lever<->%s"%(mn_all,mn_ang[0],mn_ang[6]))
print("first_penetration_angle:",firstpen)
print("d_base @ +45:",[r[2] for r in rows if r[0]==45][0]," @ -45:",[r[2] for r in rows if r[0]==-45][0])
print("d_stand min:",min(r[1] for r in rows)," d_servo min:",min(r[3] for r in rows)," d_fast min:",min(r[4] for r in rows))
csvp=r"C:\Users\Rchie\Music\FreeCADModeling\AutoCurtains\ServoTorqueTestRig_sweep.csv"
with open(csvp,"w",newline="") as f:
    w=csv.writer(f); w.writerow(["angle_deg","d_stand_mm","d_base_mm","d_servo_mm","d_fasteners_mm","min_clearance_mm","min_pair","penetration_mm3"]); w.writerows(rows)
print("CSV updated:",csvp,"rows",len(rows))
print("END",NONCE)
